methods.description: This method involves the preparation of sediment samples for the extraction and analysis of plutonium isotopes. It is used to determine the concentration and isotopic ratios of Pu in environmental samples.

steps.description: The sediment samples were dried at 105°C for 24 h.
steps.searchable_summary: dry sediment samples at 105°C for 24 hours

steps.description: Samples were placed in ceramic crucibles and ashed in a muffle furnace at 600°C for 5 h.
steps.searchable_summary: ash samples in muffle furnace at 600°C for 5 hours

steps.description: The ignition loss in each sample was determined by the decrease in sample weight before and after the ashing process.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate ignition loss by weight difference

steps.description: About 2.0 g dried sample was weighed out and spiked with 100 µL (ca. 1 pg 242 Pu) standard 242 Pu solution.
steps.searchable_summary: spike dried sample with 242 Pu solution

steps.description: The extraction of Pu was performed in a tightly covered Teflon tube with 20 mL concentrated HNO3 on a hot plate at 180-200°C for at least 4 h.
steps.searchable_summary: extract Pu using HNO3 in Teflon tube on hot plate

steps.description: A two-stage anion-exchange chromatographic method using AG 1X8 and AG MP-1M resins was employed to separate U and Pu and further purify Pu.
steps.searchable_summary: separate and purify Pu using anion-exchange chromatography

steps.description: The final sample was prepared in 0.8 mL 4% HNO3 media for Pu isotope analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare final sample in 4% HNO3 for analysis

methods.description: This method describes the measurement of Pu isotopes and atomic ratios using SF-ICP-MS, including steps to enhance sensitivity and ensure accuracy.

steps.description: The measurement of the concentration of Pu isotopes and Pu atomic ratios was done with a double-focusing SF-ICP-MS.
An APEX-Q high-efficiency sample introduction system with membrane desolvation unit and a conical concentric nebulizer was used.
steps.searchable_summary: use APEX-Q system for sample introduction

steps.description: Replaced the normal skimmer cone with a high-efficiency cone to further increase the sensitivity of the SF-ICP-MS.
steps.searchable_summary: replace skimmer cone with high-efficiency cone

steps.description: A Pu isotope standard solution with a known 240 Pu/239 Pu atom ratio was used for mass bias correction.
steps.searchable_summary: use standard solution for mass bias correction

steps.description: Two ocean sediment reference materials were used for analytical method validation.
